basics.name: Aman Kumar
basics.title: Assistant System Engineer
basics.summary: Mechanical Engineering graduate with experience as an Assistant System Engineer at TCS and a background in education and research. Skilled in Oracle BI, SQL, and data analysis.

bullets: Developed and optimized Oracle BI reports to deliver actionable insights for business decision-making.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to gather requirements and implement tailored BI solutions. Quantify where possible.
Collaborate with stakeholders to gather business requirements and design solutions within the Oracle Fusion HCM framework.
Prepare technical design documents and ensure adherence to best practices.
Build custom reports, interfaces and integrations using Fusion Technology.
Performed data migration, transformation, and validation activities.
Conducted online classes up to class 10 for Physics and Chemistry
Engaged with parents through structured sessions to present course offerings and successfully convert enrollments.
Conducted systematic evaluation of Physics and Chemistry answer scripts (up to Class 10) for BYJU’S examinations.
Co-authored a peer-reviewed research paper published by Springer, based on numerical simulation and experimental analysis for aerodynamic optimization.
Applied data-driven analysis and structured problem solving to validate models through simulations using Ansys software and wind-tunnel experiments.
Presented research insights at an academic conference.

achievements.title: McKinsey Forward Program
achievements.context: Developed core consulting skills through the McKinsey Forward Program, including problem-solving, stakeholder communication, data analysis, and agile teamwork.

achievements.title: Market Mania 2025 - Rank 10
achievements.context: Achieved Rank 10 in Market Mania 2025, a live marketing project competition by Finance Veda, focusing on real-world marketing strategy and execution.

achievements.title: Cambridge English: Preliminary (B1)
achievements.context: University of Cambridge – Cambridge English: Preliminary (B1), demonstrating professional working proficiency in English.

achievements.title: GATE 2025 - AIR 647
achievements.context: Cleared GATE 2025 in Humanities and Social Sciences, achieving AIR 647, reflecting strong analytical and reasoning skills.

achievements.title: DRDO DRUSE (East Zone) - 3rd Rank
achievements.context: DRDO DRUSE (East Zone) – 3rd Rank for innovation in robotics and unmanned systems.

projects.title: SAE Supra Formula Student Project (2018–19)
bullets: Part of a student team that designed, built, and tested a race car for a national competition, using data and testing to improve performance.

extra.title: Volunteering - TCS Youth Employment Program
extra.content: Contributed as a volunteer in the TCS Youth Employment Program, supporting skill development and employability of underprivileged youth.

extra.title: Volunteering - CUET-UG Mentor
extra.content: Served as a CUET-UG Mentor, guiding students on exam strategy, academic planning, and confidence building.
